text: SPEAKER_02: Hello. SPEAKER_01: Hello. SPEAKER_01: Can I talk to Ruby ma'am? SPEAKER_02: No, that is not there. SPEAKER_02: Tell me. SPEAKER_01: He had searched for makeup courses. SPEAKER_01: He had to get details for that. SPEAKER_02: So, what is your course? SPEAKER_01: Where do you live? SPEAKER_01: In which location? SPEAKER_02: Ghaziabad. SPEAKER_01: Ghaziabad. SPEAKER_01: So, can Noida come for these classes? SPEAKER_01: Noida sector 62. SPEAKER_02: Is there anyone in Ghaziabad? SPEAKER_01: Ghaziabad. SPEAKER_01: I searched and saw. SPEAKER_01: Is there anyone in RDC Ghaziabad? SPEAKER_01: After the recent closure of RDC, it was opened again. SPEAKER_01: But I am not sure if their bachelors have started or not. SPEAKER_01: Because some students were there at least at the end of last month. SPEAKER_01: And at the beginning of this month, at 4-5 pm, because of the AC current in Vijayanagara, they have been admitted here. SPEAKER_01: Where is it in Noida? SPEAKER_01: There is 62 metro station in Noida, it is right next to it. SPEAKER_01: It is 2 minutes long. SPEAKER_02: 62 means electronic city? SPEAKER_01: Yes, it is next to the first station. SPEAKER_01: It is on the main road. SPEAKER_01: I will share the location. SPEAKER_01: One day you can get us to attend your trial class. SPEAKER_01: Whatever course you like, you can decide and tell us. SPEAKER_02: What is your course, if we talk about basic to advanced? SPEAKER_01: Basic to advanced makeup. SPEAKER_02: Makeup. SPEAKER_01: The course of makeup, sir, if you do the first level only, then you will get it in about 36,000-37,000 rupees. SPEAKER_01: In that, you will have to do the ideal engagement in the party. SPEAKER_02: Basic plus advanced. SPEAKER_01: Yes. SPEAKER_02: Basic plus advanced, right? SPEAKER_01: No, it's not compulsory. SPEAKER_01: Many children do basic only. SPEAKER_01: They have to run the salon for 12 months. SPEAKER_01: No, no. SPEAKER_01: The makeup of models and photoshoots do not work for them. SPEAKER_01: So, there is a separate option for both. SPEAKER_01: You can also take combined. SPEAKER_01: I know the combined. SPEAKER_01: What will be the basic plus advance? SPEAKER_01: The basic to advance will be of 5 months. SPEAKER_01: From the current offer, it will come to 57,000-58,000. SPEAKER_01: Basic plus advance? SPEAKER_01: Yes. SPEAKER_02: Is it 56,000 or 57,000? SPEAKER_01: 57,000. SPEAKER_02: It will be 57,000. SPEAKER_01: 57,000. SPEAKER_01: Yes, 3,000 less than 8,000. SPEAKER_02: Yes, it's 57. SPEAKER_02: It's 5 years. SPEAKER_01: Yes, yes. SPEAKER_02: Will there be pre-work included in this? SPEAKER_02: Pre-work like facial and all? SPEAKER_01: No, sir. SPEAKER_01: This is a makeup course. SPEAKER_01: Only makeup? SPEAKER_01: Only makeup will come in this. SPEAKER_01: That's why I was saying that when we will visit, I will show you the combo of skin and makeup. SPEAKER_01: I will also show you the basics to advance of makeup and skin makeup and hair. SPEAKER_01: I will also show you the combined one which is called cosmetology. SPEAKER_01: Based on that, people run their own salons. SPEAKER_01: So, if someone just wants to do a job and doesn't have any business plan yet, they can go for basic tutorials in one particular subject. SPEAKER_01: If they feel that they have to do it in 2 years, then this is their business start. SPEAKER_01: So, then I suggest everyone that a little bit of skin, a little bit of makeup, both should come. SPEAKER_01: And the first level of skin and makeup should also be done. SPEAKER_01: So, that also comes up to about 55,000. SPEAKER_01: So, we can also do that. SPEAKER_01: Yes, there are classes on Sunday as well. SPEAKER_02: Please give me the location on this number. SPEAKER_01: Yes, I will share the location and you can come on Sunday. SPEAKER_02: And please write down the charges for your courses as well. SPEAKER_02: Yes, sir. SPEAKER_02: Okay. SPEAKER_02: I will come on Sunday and give you the location.
